sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104057" key="*tita/nia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τῑτάν-ια</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[τᾱ]</pron> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱερά</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n104057.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">festival of the Titans</tr_>, Theodos.Gr. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:p.69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.69</biblScope> </bibl> Göttling.</sense> </entryFree>
